zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY於大約1017年之後出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利皮朋特時，他的母親Blanche Percy9005歲，父親Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III8994歲。他於大約1047年與Catherina de la Haye在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利a特爾--布雷結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1090年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY于大约1017年之后出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利皮朋特时，他的母亲Blanche Percy9005岁，父亲Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III8994岁。他于大约1047年与Catherina de la Haye在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利a特爾--布雷结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1090年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: PERCY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

en.lifeSummary: When Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY was born after about 1017, in Pierrepont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his mother, Blanche Percy, was 9005 and his father, Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III, was 8994. He married Catherina de la Haye about 1047, in Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died after about 1090, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY est né après environ 1017, à Pierrepont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, sa mère, Blanche Percy, avait 9005 ans et son père, Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III, avait 8994 ans. Il a épousé Catherina de la Haye environ 1047, à Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé après environ 1090, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY nach um 1017 in Pierrepont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Blanche Percy 9005 und sein Vater Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III 8994. Er hat um 1047 in Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Catherina de la Haye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach um 1090 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY è nato il dopo il circa 1017 nel Pierrepont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo madre, Blanche Percy, aveva 9005 anni e il suo padre, Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III, aveva 8994 anni. Lui sposato Catherina de la Haye circa 1047, nel Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il circa 1090, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-Fra: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピエレプオント-スル-アvア
ja.Neufchâtel, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Norman: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフチaテル-エン-ブレイ
ja.lifeSummary: Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCYが約1017年以後にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメピエレプオントで生まれた時，母Blanche Percyは9005歳，父Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel IIIは8994歳であった。約1047年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフチaテル-エン-ブレイでCatherina de la Hayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1090年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY(이)가 대략 1017년 이후 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Blanche Percy(은)는 9005세였고, 그의 아버지 Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III(은)는 8994세였다. 그는 대략 1047년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프cha텔--브라이에서 Catherina de la Haye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1090년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mg.after about 1017–after about 1090: tany ho any aorian'ny 1017–tany ho any aorian'ny 1090

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY nasceu após aproximadamente 1017, em Pierrepont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, sua mãe, Blanche Percy, tinha 9005 anos e seu pai, Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III, tinha 8994 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherina de la Haye aproximadamente 1047, em Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu após aproximadamente 1090, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY родился после около 1017 г. в местности пьиррепонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его матери по имени Blanche Percy было 9005 лет, а отцу, которого звали Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III, 8994. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherina de la Haye около 1047 г. в местности неуфчaтел-ен-брэи, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер после около 1090 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ingolbran DE PIERREPONT-DE PERCY nació después de aproximadamente 1017, en Pierrepont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su mamá, Blanche Percy, tenía 9005 años y su papá, Geoffroi de Pierrepont de Trepel III, tenía 8994 años. Se casó con Catherina de la Haye aproximadamente 1047, en Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de aproximadamente 1090, en su pueblo.
